title: الشيف كريم
active_visual_locks: 2D cartoon style characters, never photoreal humans
Bold outlines, expressive faces, wide exaggerated expressions
Warm Cairo palette (ochre, terracotta, soft yellow), warm color temperature always
Food must look craveable, glossy, with visible steam and rich highlights, never childish or flat
Karim: messy dark curly hair | warm brown eyes | short trimmed beard | green rubber wristband on RIGHT hand | cracked Android phone | home apron over blue hoodie or white t-shirt
Same wardrobe and props in every episode unless the script explicitly describes a change
No random characters, no text baked into the scene, no watermarks, no logos
Arabic text overlays added in post-production, never baked into the generated video
2D cartoon hybrid style with bold outlines, never photoreal.
Warm Cairo palette (ochre, terracotta, soft yellow), warm color temperature always.
Fast comedic reaction shots with exaggerated facial expressions.
Food must be craveable, glossy, with visible steam and rich highlights.
No baked-in text or logos in the video generation.

protagonist_bible.name: كريم منصور
visual_locks: messy dark curly hair, always slightly disheveled
default outfit: old blue hoodie or faded white t-shirt
off-white home apron when cooking at home
green rubber wristband on RIGHT hand (always visible)

episodes.name: The Midnight Truffle Calamity
episodes.summary: Karim attempts a stealthy gourmet late-night snack (truffle ful with poached eggs) while his mom sleeps. It ends in a burnt hand and a broken egg, but he posts it with delusional pride. Fares view-bots him to 34 views.
episodes.cliffhanger: Karim hits 34 views and captions his failed dish 'Egyptian fine dining, stay tuned' — he genuinely believes he's a star. Teases the 2otbo5ly app for those who want real food without the kitchen disasters.
continuity_updates: Karim's delusional confidence and passion are established.
Fares is officially introduced as the chaotic hype man and view-botter.
The green wristband on Karim's right hand and the blue/white speckled pot are locked as visual anchors.
episodes.continuity_goal: Establish Karim as deeply passionate but hilariously untrained, and introduce Fares as his ride-or-die chaotic sidekick.
episodes.character_sheet_prompt_en: Karim: 2D cartoon stylized Egyptian man, 24 years old, messy dark curly hair, warm brown eyes, short trimmed beard, wearing a home apron over a blue hoodie, green rubber wristband strictly on his right hand, holding a budget Android phone with a cracked bottom-right corner. Bold outlines, expressive face. Fares: tall, lanky Egyptian man, 25 years old, wide expressive eyes, wearing a red Ahly football jersey, restless energy.
